title: S3LLM: Large-Scale Scientific Software Understanding with LLMs using Source, Metadata, and Document

methodology.core_approach: Using locally deployed open-source LLMs for the rapid understanding of large-scale scientific computing software.
methodology.key_benefit: Eliminating the need for extensive coding expertise to make the process more efficient and effective.

purpose.main_goal: To provide a user-friendly interface for interacting with complex scientific computing software through conversational, natural language queries.
problem_addressed: Complexity of large-scale scientific software due to multiple programming languages (e.g., Fortran, Pascal).
Large volume of code (millions of lines) hindering comprehensive understanding.
Poor or inadequate documentation for scientific software systems.
